meaning: European Payments Union 欧洲支付同盟
examples: Among the largest underlying components of EPU, in trading today Buenaventura Mining Company ( BVN) is off about 0.86%, and Southern Copper ( SCCO) is up by about 0.35%.
Among the largest underlying components of EPU, in trading today CrediCorp Ltd. ( NYSE: BAP) is trading flat, and Compania de Minas Buenaventura S.A. ( NYSE: BVN) is higher by about 0.2%.
The chart of the iShares MSCI All Peru Index Fund ( EPU) is a good example of how hazardous it can be to invest in single-country funds without using appropriate risk controls.
